untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of pullback structure complexity (simple vs. complex) and alternation pattern between pullback types. This requires pattern recognition and multi-leg analysis not available in the allowed indicator set. Pullback structure classification cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators (price, MA, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Bar Properties). The core logic of 'expecting opposite pullback type after each occurrence' requires custom pattern detection logic beyond indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Substituted trend confirmation via ADX > 25 and MA positioning as a proxy for trend establishment. Entry conditions detect trend direction relative to sma_20. Exit conditions are reversal-based (trend line break simulated as MA cross). Parameters for 'minimum_trend_legs_observed' and 'confirmation_candles_required' set to reasonable defaults (adx_14 threshold and hold_days_max). The fundamental pullback alternation pattern cannot be mechanically expressed without custom structural analysis.
